description: AG4 validation-floor snapshot. Floors may only shrink with a controller-reviewed boundary decision; test counts should grow with new source surfaces, stable export count is exact, Core reference baseline is exact through core-import-boundary, and pack entries must not fall below this source-package preview floor.

rules.tests: minimumDeclaredTestCases and minimumTestFiles are floors; increases are allowed and should update this snapshot when intentional.
rules.publicExports: stablePublicExportCount is exact and must match agent-public-api-boundary.json plus package.json exports.
rules.coreReferences: coreReferenceLimitTotal is exact from positive config/core-import-boundary.json referenceLimits; actual forbidden/deep imports remain enforced by lint:core-import-boundary.
rules.packEntries: minimumPackEntries is a floor from npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts; decreases require release-boundary review.

requiredCoverageSuites.name: v2 terminal execution
requiredCoverageSuites.pattern: binds V2 terminal exec calls to the injected sandbox executor

requiredCoverageSuites.name: v2 terminal cancellation
requiredCoverageSuites.pattern: routes V2 terminal cancellation as a structured partial timeout result

requiredCoverageSuites.name: terminal session execution
requiredCoverageSuites.pattern: leases persistent terminal sessions for execution and releases portable records

requiredCoverageSuites.name: provider malformed body
requiredCoverageSuites.pattern: treats malformed provider bodies as empty text without fabricating tool calls

requiredCoverageSuites.name: provider mid-stream drop
requiredCoverageSuites.pattern: surfaces mid-stream JSON body drops instead of returning a false success

requiredCoverageSuites.name: provider streaming abort
requiredCoverageSuites.pattern: propagates streaming abort signals through the provider fetch path
